items.title: Singer D4vd confirmed as 'target' of investigation into murder of teen
items.description: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.

items.title: Girl, 14, shot dead as South Africa's 'taxi wars' hit school
items.description: Violence has plagued South Africa's highly competitive and lucrative taxi industry for decades.

items.title: Is Ethiopia heading back to war in Tigray?
items.description: Many people are again leaving the region of Tigray just over three years after the civil war there ended.

items.title: Russia says it has handed over 1,000 Ukrainian soldiers' bodies
items.description: Russia's announcement comes as Ukraine's top negotiator was meeting US peace envoys in Geneva.

items.title: US justice department accused of withholding Trump-related Epstein files
items.description: The top Democrat on the congressional panel investigating Epstein has called on the attorney general to publish the material.
